eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Los Angeles; Riverside; San Diego, CA; at 7:21 PM on MAY 25, 2026 Effective until 9:21 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
AN AMBER ALERT IS BEING ISSUED BY THE CALIFORNIA HIGHWAY PATROL ON BEHALF OF THE LOS ANGELES POLICE DEPARTMENT.

ON MAY 24, 2026, AT 04 00 AM, DALEZA FREGOSO WAS ABDUCTED FROM LOS ANGELES, CALIFORNIA.  DALEZA FREGOSO IS A 4 YEAR OLD HISPANIC FEMALE, 3 FEET TALL, WEIGHING 45 POUNDS, WITH BLACK HAIR AND BROWN EYES.  

THE SUSPECT, RUBEN FREGOSO, IS A 40 YEAR OLD HISPANIC MALE, STANDING 5 FEET 9 INCHES TALL, WEIGHING 200 POUNDS WITH BLACK HAIR AND BROWN EYES. 

THE SUSPECT WAS LAST SEEN DRIVING A 2019 WHITE LAND ROVER DISCOVERY, WITH CALIFORNIA LICENSE PLATE NUMBER 9 D A W 7 1 5.

IF SEEN CALL 9 1 1
